name: Million Dollar Fudge (Mamie Eisenhower's Fudg
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces semisweet chocolate, chopped into pieces
12 ounces German sweet chocolate, broken up
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, salt, butter, and evaporated milk in a saucepan.
2. Bring mixture to boil and continue boiling for 6 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, combine semisweet chocolate pieces, German sweet chocolate, marshmallow cream, and chopped nuts.
4. Pour the boiling syrup over the chocolate mixture and beat until the chocolate is melted.
5. Pour the mixture into a buttered 9-inch square pan to cool.
6. Cut the fudge into squares. Each square contains about: 347 calories; 51 mg sodium; 8 mg cholesterol; 15 grams fat; 54 grams carbohydrates; 4 grams protein; 0.22 gram fiber.
Source: Mamie Eisenhower, shared by millions of fans throughout the years. Presented by Rose Dosti, L.A. Times, Culinary SOS, 5/27/93, page H37.
